title: dryopteris filix-mas f. crenata
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas f. crenata, also known as the crested male fern, is a subspecies of the male fern plant (Dryopteris filix-mas) that is characterized by its unique, lobed fronds. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris filix-mas f. crenata include its potential to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. Dryopteris filix-mas f. crenata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
